canonical_definition: A comprehensive, in-the-wild, and open-ended benchmark designed to evaluate the performance of large language models in generating long text.

relationships.evidence: To evaluate the performance of PIC in long-form text generation, we select HelloBench (Que et al., 2024) and LongBench-Write (Bai et al., 2024) as the evaluation benchmarks. (Section 4.1)
